name: call-lana-merged
description: Dieses Package enthält die **komplette Call Lana Website** mit allen Updates und Korrekturen.

scripts.test:e2e:fast: npx playwright test tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.ts tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts tests/e2e/rbac.spec.ts tests/e2e/crud-operations.spec.ts
scripts.test:all: npx vitest run && node scripts/smoke-test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.ts tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts tests/e2e/sales-flow.spec.ts
scripts.verify: node build.js && npx vitest run && node scripts/smoke-test.js
scripts.test:ci: node build.js && npx vitest run && node scripts/smoke-test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.ts tests/e2e/sales-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/rbac.spec.ts tests/e2e/crud-operations.spec.ts tests/e2e/conversations.spec.ts tests/e2e/performance.spec.ts tests/e2e/404.spec.ts tests/e2e/blog.spec.ts tests/e2e/cookie-consent.spec.ts tests/e2e/i18n.spec.ts
